features: The Ultimate R&R - Eye-bright, overnight with our eye gel pads. Packed with retinol, known to reduce appearance of fine lines and plump the skin, each eye patch revitalizes tired eyes and restores luminance to your complexion.

Bye-Bye, Raccoon Eyes - Up all night? Just had a good cry? With our brightening under eye patches for dark circles, it’s time to look on the bright side. Face the day with reduced puffiness and dark circles. Never get told “you look tired” again.

Eye Care & Repair In Your Sleep - Our under eye pads are powered by sea moss, ceramide, and fatty acids that restore the delicate skin of your under eyes while you sleep. These overnight eye patches are your secret weapon for waking up fresh.

Loved By Thousands - Our gel eye mask has been featured on Fab Fit Fun, Ipsy, & Boxy Charm and used by Jessica Alba and Leona Lewis. Join the glam gang and see why everybody loves our brightening gel eye patches!

Awesome Gifts for Glow-Getters - Whether for a birthday or a bachelorette bash, you can never go wrong with our retinol eye patches for puffy eyes. Enjoy our 30-Day Feel Good Policy. If you're not 100% happy, just let us know & we'll make it right!

Rave Reviews These under eye masks don’t just look incredibly luxe, they’re also enriched with a high concentration of nutrients. They provide instant de-puffing & a noticeable difference in fine lines & dark circles. - Buzzfeed These HA miracle-workers will have you looking like you’ve slept for days, even if you binged watched TV all night. - Buzzfeed These cooling under eye patches not only look tinsel-level shiny, they’re packed with all you need to get a shadowy under-eye area gleaming. - The Cut Vegan, Cruelty-Free Formula grace & stella’s eye patches for puffy eyes and dark circles combine vegan goodness and clean ingredients. No parabens, no sulfates - just pure comfort for your skin. You’ll forget they’re on! Hygienic & Travel-Friendly Our purple under eye patches for puffy eyes come in singular, travel-friendly packets that ensure a hygienic and effortless application every time. For bright eyes whenever you are, at home or on-the-go! Give the Gift of Self-Care Our gel eye patches come in a pretty pink box, perfect for bachelorette bundles, party favors, or gifts under the tree. Try Our Other 3 Colors! Looking for daytime eye masks to supplement our bedtime eye gel patches? No need to stress about choosing the right color. Try them all with our 72-pack of Gold, Pink, and Blue.
